comments.body:
## TDD: Tests from 3a77-1b3d must fail RED before, pass GREEN after

Create plugins/dso/scripts/gh-availability-check.sh

## Implementation
- Check: command -v gh (installed?) then gh auth status (authenticated?)
- Output GH_STATUS=authenticated|not_authenticated|not_installed
- When not_authenticated: print exact gh variable set / gh secret set commands for all provided --vars and --secrets
- When not_installed: print GitHub.com UI navigation steps (Settings > Secrets and Variables > Actions)
- Accept --vars=VAR1,VAR2 --secrets=SECRET1 to customize which vars/secrets to include in fallback
- Remove RED marker from .test-index

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Script exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/gh-availability-check.sh
- [ ] RED marker removed
  Verify: { grep 'gh-availability-check.sh' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index | grep -qv '\['; }
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
